title: Midnight Lockbox - Noon Ultimatum Beat Scene
prompt: Story: Midnight Lockbox (midnight-lockbox) | Hook: A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next. | Subgenre: supernatural mystery | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels | Villain: The Quartermaster | Villain worldview: Storage is memory, and memory belongs to whoever controls access. | Motifs: unit tags, bolt cutters, time-lock stickers. Beat: Noon Ultimatum (Day Two: Pressure). Narrative: The antagonist sends a noon deadline: open the lockbox publicly or lose your only witness.. Render an immersive scene frame with spatial depth and hidden clue affordance.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
